ydour.description: YDOUR exists to bring together the amateur cinema community and cinema lovers.

films-de-hammamlif.description: "Films de Hammam-Lif" aims to revive this lost spirit and inspire a new generation's connection to cinema and culture.

afterwork-movienight.description: Intimate film screenings and discussions with filmmakers at Day One. A space to explore the ideas and process behind each film.

ydour-v2.description: Second edition of YDOUR: a space for amateur cinema.
